translation.settings.relays.node.detail.fallbackActi: This relay is connected as temporary fallback coverage, not primary configured transport.
translation.settings.relays.node.detail.degraded: This relay is connected, but it is still being evaluated after recent failures.
translation.settings.relays.node.detail.highLatency: The socket is open, but observed latency is high enough to reduce delivery quality.
translation.settings.storage.effectiveModeDesc: Derived from active provider and local vault toggles.
translation.settings.storage.reliabilityCoreV087Desc: Adaptive relay scoring + quorum publishing, sync checkpoint/backfill controls, and storage resilience diagnostics.
translation.settings.storage.stabilityModeV090Desc: Forces the safe Add Friend path (contact card/npub/pubkey) and hides unstable discovery UI.
translation.settings.storage.deterministicDiscoveryV: Resolver + request outbox experimental flow. Requires Rust protocol core and stability mode disabled.
translation.settings.storage.protocolCoreRustV090Des: Enables runtime adapters backed by Rust protocol contracts for identity/session/outbox paths.
translation.settings.storage.x3dhRatchetV090Desc: Enables the full rewritten E2EE handshake/session path. Keep off until Wave C gates pass.
translation.settings.storage.discoveryRolloutFlagsDe: Guard incremental discovery lanes while keeping deterministic add as the canonical path.
translation.settings.storage.discoveryInviteCodeDesc: Allow `OBSCUR-*` code resolution in Add Friend.
translation.settings.storage.discoveryDeepLinkDesc: Route `obscur://contact?...` links to deterministic Add Friend resolve.
translation.settings.storage.discoverySuggestionsDes: Show local-cache candidate suggestions on empty Add Friend search.
translation.settings.storage.tanstackQueryDesc: Enable guarded Query adapters for discovery, identity resolve, relay diagnostics, and account-sync readers.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderDesc: Keep profiles, encrypted backups, removal snapshots, and Vault cache together on any drive or removable device. Move this folder when you change hardware — no second hidden install tree.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderRestartNote: Obscur restarts automatically after you confirm a folder change. Existing data is copied when needed.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderMigrationDial: Move Obscur data to new folder?
Your profiles, database, vault cache, and backups will be copied from {{from}} to {{to}}. The destination must be empty. Obscur will restart automatically after you confirm.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderResetDialogTi: Move data back to default folder?
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderResetDialogDe: Your profiles, database, vault cache, and backups will be copied from {{from}} to the default app-data folder ({{to}}). Obscur will restart automatically after you confirm.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderMigrationSucc: Moved {{count}} item(s) to the new folder. Restarting Obscur…
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderAlreadyBound: Obscur is already using this data folder.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderAnchorReplace: The app path at {{anchor}} also contains Obscur data. It will be replaced by a redirect to {{path}}. Only data at {{path}} is kept.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderConflictDialo: Obscur data was found at {{target}}. You can reconnect and use that folder, or overwrite it with data from {{source}}.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderOverwriteDial: All Obscur profiles, database files, vault cache, and backups at {{target}} will be permanently replaced with data copied from {{source}}. Export a backup first if you may need the current folder contents.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderOverwriteSucc: Replaced data at destination and moved {{count}} item(s). Restarting Obscur…
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderImportHint: Original data may still exist at {{path}}. Import missing profiles and files into your current folder.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderImportDialogT: Import data from original AppData folder?
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderImportDialogD: Missing profiles, database files, vault cache, and backups will be copied from {{from}} into your current data folder ({{to}}). Existing newer files at the destination are kept. Obscur will restart automatically after you confirm.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderImportSuccess: Imported {{count}} item(s) from AppData. Restarting Obscur…
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderCommunityWarn: Community and group chat history live in your local data folder only. Relay sync restores profile and contacts, but not group membership or community history. Use Import from AppData or export a backup before moving folders.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderImportBannerD: Obscur still has a full copy at {{path}}. Import it to restore communities, group chats, and vault cache that relay sync cannot rebuild.
translation.settings.storage.vaultUnderDataFolderNot: Vault media is stored per profile at profiles/{profile}/vault inside your Obscur data folder. Change the data folder above to relocate vault files.
translation.settings.storage.vaultEncryptedSandboxNo: New vault uploads are saved as encrypted .obscurvault files on disk. Preview inside Obscur; use Download or Export for a decrypted copy.
translation.settings.storage.workspaceBundleDesc: Export profile, settings, network data, and optional Vault media into a compressed, encrypted backup. Only your account key can decrypt it.
translation.auth.keyOwnershipReminder: You own your private key. Obscur cannot recover accounts for lost keys or forgotten passwords.
translation.auth.keyRecoveryReminder: Back up your private key now and verify export in Settings > Identity after login.
translation.auth.error.secureStorageResetUnavailable: Secure storage reset is not available in this runtime.
translation.auth.secureStorageResetSuccess: Secure storage reset. You can now unlock this profile manually.
translation.auth.error.invalidPrivateKeyFormat: Invalid private key. Enter a valid `nsec` or 64-character hex key.
translation.auth.error.retiredKeyRequiresAcknowledge: This private key was previously retired on this device. Confirm reactivation before continuing.
translation.auth.error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
translation.auth.error.noLocalAccountYet: No local account exists on this device yet. Import your private key first, then you can use username/password unlock locally.
translation.auth.error.enterPasswordOrSkip: Please enter a password or skip
translation.auth.error.retiredKeyImportRequiresAckno: This private key was previously retired on this device. Confirm reactivation before importing.
translation.auth.keyAcceptedDeviceUnlock: Key accepted. Device-only unlock was created for this profile.
translation.auth.secureStorageRecoveryDesc: Native auto-unlock was skipped for this profile.
translation.auth.secureStorageRecoveryHint: You can also continue with your password or private key below.
translation.auth.privateKeyMismatchDesc: The entered private key does not match the account stored on this profile.
translation.auth.privateKeyMismatchHint: Import the correct key for this profile, or switch to the intended account before continuing.
translation.auth.welcome.subtitle: The most private way to communicate. Decentralized & anonymous.
translation.auth.create.pickNameDesc: This will be your visible profile name.
translation.auth.create.secureItDesc: Set a password to protect your keys.
translation.auth.passwordGenerated: Password generated. Please save it securely.
translation.auth.passwordRecoveryWarning: There is no password recovery. If you lose this password and device, your account may be unrecoverable. You can log in from any device using your private key, so never lose it.
translation.auth.acknowledgeKeyResponsibility: I understand I am responsible for my keys
translation.auth.login.welcomeBackDesc: Unlock on this device. Import a unified backup first if you need your full account data restored.
translation.auth.login.backupRequiredWarning: Importing your private key unlocks this account, but messages, relays, and settings are not restored unless you import a unified .obscur-account-export.json backup first (use Restore from backup below).
translation.auth.login.secureSessionDesc: You can set a password now, or skip and use your key directly.
translation.auth.login.deviceLocalHint: Username/password unlock is device-local. Import your private key once on this device to enable it.
translation.auth.import.privateKeyHelp: Import Key restores an existing account only. If this key has no local or relay-backed account evidence, use Create Account instead.
translation.auth.import.retiredKeyWarning: This key was previously marked as retired on this device. Reactivating it can restore prior identity links from relays.
translation.auth.import.retiredKeyAcknowledge: I understand and want to reactivate this identity on this device
translation.auth.optionalPasswordHelp: Leave blank to use key-only login. If Remember Me is enabled, a device-only unlock will be created.
translation.search.discovery.identity.unsupportedTok: Use a contact card, npub, or hex pubkey for Add Friend.
translation.search.discovery.identity.legacyUnresolv: Invite code could not be resolved. Ask for QR/contact link/npub.
translation.search.discovery.reason.relayDegraded: Relay network is degraded. Showing partial results.
translation.search.discovery.reason.offline: Offline mode: only cached and local results are available.
translation.search.discovery.reason.unsupportedToken: Use deterministic add tokens: QR, contact card, Friend Code, npub, or pubkey.
translation.search.discovery.reason.privateKeyForbid: This looks like a private key. Never paste private keys into search — share npub, a contact card, or a friend code instead.
translation.security.literacy.title: Protect your identity
translation.security.literacy.neverAskForSecrets: Obscur will never ask for your passphrase or private key in chat, email, or support messages. Only enter secrets on the lock screen or Import Key flow inside this app.
translation.security.identityBinding.title: Verify identity fingerprint
translation.security.identityBinding.displayNameUntr: Display names can be faked — confirm the fingerprint below matches who you expect.
translation.security.identityBinding.accept.title: Accept this connection?
translation.security.identityBinding.accept.descript: Confirm the fingerprint matches the person you expect before accepting.
translation.security.sendCeremony.title: Confirm who you are messaging
translation.security.sendCeremony.trustConfirmDescri: This message matches high-risk patterns for contacts you have not accepted. Confirm the recipient identity before it leaves your device.
translation.security.sendCeremony.description: You are sending as {{sender}} to {{recipient}}. Confirm both fingerprints before this message leaves your device.
translation.security.linkSafety.title: Open this link?
translation.security.linkSafety.description: This URL matches a suspicious shape — credential pages, shorteners, or lookalike domains. Open only if you trust the sender.
translation.security.exportSafety.title: Save this file?
translation.security.exportSafety.description: This attachment matches a risky shape or comes from a contact you have not accepted with elevated trust signals. Open only if you trust the sender.
translation.security.export.dialogDesc: Anyone with this file can steal your identity. Store it offline, encrypted, and never share it in chat or email.
translation.security.export.confirmRequired: Type "{{phrase}}" to export your private key.
translation.security.export.revealRequired: Reveal your private key before exporting.
translation.security.export.unavailable: Private key is not currently available to export.
translation.security.export.exported: Private key exported. Store the file offline and delete copies you do not need.
translation.security.export.clipboardClearNotice: Clipboard will clear in 30 seconds for safety.
translation.security.passphrase.policy.too_short: Use at least 12 characters, or a passphrase of four or more words.
translation.security.passphrase.policy.common_passwo: This password is too common. Choose a unique passphrase.
translation.security.unlock.rateLimited: Too many failed unlock attempts. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
translation.search.discovery.reason.invalidCode: Invalid code format. Ask for a new code, QR, or contact link.
translation.search.discovery.reason.expiredCode: Code expired. Ask for a new short code.
translation.search.discovery.reason.codeUsed: Code already used. Ask for a new short code.
translation.search.discovery.reason.legacyUnresolvab: Legacy code could not be resolved. Ask for QR/contact link/Friend Code.
translation.search.discovery.reason.indexFallback: Index unavailable and relay fallback degraded. Use QR/contact card/npub.
translation.search.discovery.relay.recovering: Obscur is rebuilding relay connections. Search is using direct, cached, and index results first.
translation.search.discovery.relay.degraded: Relay connections are degraded. Search may return partial results while recovery continues.
translation.search.discovery.relay.offline: No relay connection is available. Search is limited to direct, cached, and local results.
translation.search.discovery.placeholder.addFriendDe: Paste a contact card, short code, invite code, npub, or pubkey
Paste a contact card, short code, npub, or pubkey
translation.search.discovery.placeholder.addFriendLe: Paste a contact card, invite code, npub, or pubkey
translation.search.discovery.placeholder.addFriend: Paste a contact card, npub, or pubkey
translation.search.discovery.placeholder.communities: Search communities by name or relay'group
translation.search.discovery.placeholder.global: Search people, communities, npubs, nip-05 handles, or public keys
translation.search.discovery.hero.title: One search box for your network
translation.search.discovery.hero.desc: Find people and communities, then open their public profile or switch to direct add when you already have a private contact token.
translation.search.discovery.directAdd.title: Resolve one exact account
translation.search.discovery.directAdd.descLegacy: Paste a contact card, invite code, npub, or public key. Obscur should resolve one exact person here, not bury you under a fuzzy discovery list.
translation.search.discovery.directAdd.desc: Paste a contact card, npub, or public key. Obscur should resolve one exact person here, not bury you under a fuzzy discovery list.
translation.search.discovery.diagnostics.title: Rollout visibility
translation.search.discovery.diagnostics.desc: Local diagnostics for discovery lookup quality and conversion events in this session.
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.title: Use this person or reject the token
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.resolvingDes: Obscur is resolving the token against deterministic identity paths.
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.noExactDescL: Paste a contact card, invite code, npub, or public key in the search bar above.
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.noExactDesc: Paste a contact card, npub, or public key in the search bar above.
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.emptyDescLeg: Paste a contact card, invite code, npub, or public key and the exact account will appear here.
translation.search.discovery.exactMatch.emptyDesc: Paste a contact card, npub, or public key and the exact account will appear here.
translation.search.discovery.empty.title: No Results
translation.search.discovery.empty.descPrefix: Try a name, a nip-05 handle, an npub, a public key, or a community identifier like
translation.search.discovery.start.title: Start with a global search
translation.search.discovery.start.desc: Look up people and communities from one place, then open a profile, send an invitation, or switch to direct add when someone shares a private contact token.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.queueHint: Obscur will queue this invitation if relays are not ready yet, and the delivery timeline below will show confirmed progress.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.deliveryHint: Obscur will only mark this invitation as delivered after relay evidence comes back.
translation.search.discovery.share.title: Share My Contact
translation.search.discovery.share.desc: Use short code, contact link/card, npub/pubkey, or QR.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.title: Invitation Delivery
translation.search.discovery.invitation.timelineDesc: This timeline shows what Obscur has actually confirmed so far.
translation.search.discovery.suggestions.title: Friend Suggestions
translation.search.discovery.suggestions.desc: Local suggestions from recent identity metadata. Nothing new is published when viewing this list.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.attemptingDe: Obscur is trying to deliver your invitation.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.timeout: Request timed out. Relay quality is degraded; please retry.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.partial: Invitation reached part of the network.
translation.search.discovery.invitation.waitingForRe: Delivery is waiting for a healthier relay connection.
translation.auth.loginHelp.nativeTitle: How sign-in works on this device
translation.auth.loginHelp.webTitle: How sign-in works in this browser
translation.auth.loginHelp.nativeBody: Enter your device login password to unlock this profile. After a successful unlock, Obscur stores your session in OS secure storage so you can reopen the app without signing in again. Your password is never saved in the browser.
translation.auth.loginHelp.nativeBodyManualDesktop: Enter your device login password to unlock this profile. On desktop, refresh and app restart currently require unlocking again. Your password is never saved in the browser.
translation.auth.loginHelp.webBody: Enter your device login password to unlock this profile. Your session stays available while this browser tab remains open.
translation.auth.login.noDevicePasswordGuide: This device has no saved password for this profile. Unlock with your private key on the Import Key tab, then choose whether to set a device login password.
translation.auth.error.privateKeyMismatch: Private key does not match this profile.
translation.auth.login.welcomeBackPasswordRepair: Enter your existing device login password to unlock {{profile}}. Import Key is available if password unlock fails.
translation.auth.login.welcomeBackUnlockNamed: Enter your device login password to unlock {{profile}}.
translation.auth.login.welcomeBackLocalEvidence: Unlock with your password or import key.
translation.auth.login.devicePasswordMissingGuide: No device login password is saved for this profile on this device. Go to Import Key, unlock with your private key, then choose whether to set a new password or continue with key-only sign-in.
translation.auth.login.passwordRepairHint: Try your existing device password first. Obscur will restore your saved password unlock from this profile's local storage when available.
translation.auth.login.passwordlessKeyHint: Use Import Key only if password unlock fails. Your existing device password is preserved when you unlock with key only.
translation.auth.login.setDevicePasswordDesc: Your key is verified. Add a password to use the Log In tab next time, or skip and keep unlocking with your private key.
translation.auth.import.privateKeyReturningHelp: Use when switching accounts in this profile window.
translation.auth.login.optionalMasterPasswordHint: Leave blank to unlock with key only. Setting a password enables the Log In tab next time.
translation.auth.login.keyFirstGuide: Step 1: paste your private key and continue. Step 2: set a new device password or skip.
translation.auth.sessionPolicy.mobileShellBody: After you unlock once, Obscur restores your session on this device when you refresh. Use Logout in Settings to clear it.
translation.auth.sessionPolicy.mobileShellShort: Unlock once; refresh on this device re-opens your session automatically.
translation.auth.deviceTrust.subtitle.native: Uses this device’s secure storage. Your password is not saved in the browser.
translation.auth.deviceTrust.subtitle.web: Saves an unlock token in this browser only. Use a private window if this is a shared computer.
translation.auth.deviceTrust.title: Trust this device
translation.auth.deviceTrust.status.enabled: Auto-unlock enabled for this profile on this device
translation.auth.deviceTrust.status.disabled: You will unlock manually each time you open Obscur
translation.groups.inviteMissingRoomKey: This invitation is missing encryption keys. Ask the sender to resend the invite.
translation.groups.inviteRelayJoinComplete: Community relay join published. Open the group from Network when it appears.
translation.groups.inviteRelayJoinTerminalFailed: Relay join still failed after retries. Check Settings → Relays for {{relay}}.
translation.groups.inviteRelayPublishFailedDetail: {{detail}} Tap Complete join on relay to retry.
translation.groups.inviteUnlockIdentity: Unlock your identity before joining a community.
translation.groups.inviteRelayRequiredForJoin: Relay did not confirm membership. Join was not recorded on this device.
translation.groups.inviteRelayPublishFailed: Could not reach the community relay ({{relay}}). Add it under Settings → Relays, then tap Complete join on relay.
translation.groups.inviteError: Failed to join group. Secret key error.
translation.groups.privateInviteDesc: You've been invited to join this private encrypted community.
translation.groups.inviteDefectiveHint: This invite was sent without encryption keys. Ask {{name}} to send a new invitation from the community page.
translation.groups.inviteRosterOpenHint: Accept to view the full member roster in this community.
translation.groups.inviteRosterPrivacyHint: Member names and roster details stay private until you accept and join.
translation.groups.inviteStatus.historicalCompact: Recorded in chat history. This card cannot be used again.
translation.groups.inviteStatus.expiredHint: No response within 72 hours. Ask the sender for a new invitation if you still want to join.
translation.groups.inviteStatus.supersededOutgoing: A newer invitation or response replaced this one. It is kept for history only.
translation.groups.inviteStatus.supersededIncoming: A newer invitation or response replaced this one. It is kept for history only.
translation.groups.createWaitSubtitle: Steps run in order; relay or directory may finish in the background if the network is slow.
translation.groups.createDescription: Start a workspace on trusted infrastructure (coordination + private relay).
translation.groups.noSelectableRelays: No enabled relays. Add a private wss:// relay in Settings → Relays.
translation.groups.hostHint: This room publishes through the selected relay host while still following your current relay settings baseline.
translation.groups.hostInvalidRelay: Use a real wss:// relay from Settings → Relays (not relay.internal or bare 127.0.0.1). Coordination at :8787 is separate.
translation.groups.create.coordinationOnlyDevBanner: Coordination-only dev mode: create and test membership without a live Nostr relay. Encrypted chat publish stays local until you run pnpm dev:relay (optional).
translation.groups.create.managedRelayRequiredBanner: Managed workspace requires genesis publish to your relay (localhost:7000). Start the stack with pnpm dev:desktop:online or pnpm dev:relay:docker.
translation.groups.accessOpenDesc: Anyone with the community link can join and read instantly.
translation.groups.accessDiscoverableDesc: Visible on relay. Users can request to join via direct messages.
translation.groups.accessInviteOnlyDesc: Stealth mode. No traces on relay. Join only via direct invite.
translation.groups.create.coordinationStartHint: Start coordination: pnpm -C apps/coordination dev — then confirm curl http://127.0.0.1:8787/health returns ok:true.
translation.groups.discovery.tryDifferentRelay: Try searching on a different relay or check the relay URL.
translation.messaging.historySyncWaitHint: If you do not see contacts or chat history yet, please wait a few minutes while loading and account data synchronization completes.
translation.messaging.microphoneNotDetected: No microphone was detected on this device.
translation.messaging.microphoneUnavailable: Microphone is unavailable. Check whether another app is using it.
translation.messaging.voiceCallInviteControllerNotRe: Voice call invite is unavailable right now. Please retry.
translation.messaging.voiceCallInviteQueued: Voice call invite queued due to relay instability. Please retry when relays reconnect.
translation.messaging.voiceCallInviteSendFailed: Failed to send voice call invitation.
translation.messaging.voiceCallInviteSentPartial: Voice call invite sent with partial relay coverage.
translation.messaging.voiceCallJoinFailedMissingRoom: This invitation is missing call room data.
translation.messaging.voiceCallJoinUnsupported: Voice call is not supported on this runtime.
translation.messaging.voiceCallJoinAlreadyActive: A voice call session is already active in this window.
translation.messaging.voiceCallJoinDegraded: Joining call in degraded mode. Audio quality may be limited.
translation.messaging.voiceCallJoinIdentityLocked: Identity is not ready for voice call signaling.
translation.messaging.voiceCallJoinConnectionFailed: Failed to initialize voice call connection.
translation.messaging.voiceCallSignalDeliveryWeak: Call signal delivery is weak. Waiting for relay recovery.
translation.messaging.voiceCallRemoteLeft: The other participant left the voice call.
translation.messaging.voiceCallWaitTimeout: Call setup timed out after 30 seconds.
translation.messaging.profileScopeMismatchNoticeBody: This window is bound to a different local profile slot than this account's data. Open the saved profile that owns this account, or switch this window's profile before signing in.
translation.messaging.batchDeleteShiftHint: Tip: click one message, then Shift+click another to select the range in between.
translation.messaging.hideOnThisDeviceScopeDescripti: Hides selected messages on this device only. Other devices and relays may still have copies.
translation.messaging.removeFromWorkspaceScopeDescri: Removes the message from this operator-managed workspace relay. Copies on other relays or devices outside this workspace may still exist.
translation.messaging.recallForEveryoneScopeDescript: Sends a recall request to your contact's Obscur app. Relays and other clients may still show the message.
translation.messaging.removeFromWorkspaceOutgoingOnl: Only messages you sent can be removed from this workspace.
translation.messaging.deleteForEveryoneOutgoingOnlyH: Only messages sent by you can be deleted for everyone.
translation.messaging.searchMessagesInChatPlaceholde: Search message history in this chat...
translation.messaging.hiddenOnThisDeviceHelp: These messages are hidden on this device only.
translation.messaging.showAllAgainOnThisDevice: Show all again on this device
translation.network.addContactDesc: Search for people by username, public key, or NIP-05.
translation.messaging.relayOverlap.unknownHint: Relay compatibility with {{name}} has not been assessed yet. Delivery depends on sharing a relay.
translation.messaging.relayOverlap.noOverlapDesc: {{name}} uses different relays. Messages may not be delivered unless you share a relay.
translation.contacts.dialogs.removeDesc: Are you sure you want to remove this contact from your trusted list?
translation.messaging.voiceCallMissedReturnCall: The call ended before it was answered
translation.messaging.voiceCallFailedBeforeCompletio: The call could not be completed
translation.network.trust.trustedHint: Trusted contacts skip cold-contact warnings. Mark as stranger below to preview trust notices using your saved message preview.
translation.network.trust.strangerHint: Strangers can trigger trust notices when recent messages mention payments or urgency.
translation.network.trust.dismissedOrClear: No active trust notice for this contact right now (dismissed or no matching signals).
translation.network.trust.markStrangerDesc: This removes the trusted connection so you can preview stranger trust notices. You can accept them again from chat or requests.
translation.network.trust.sensitivityHint.relaxed: Fewer spam and social-engineering notices for this contact. Does not change whether they are a trusted connection.
translation.network.trust.sensitivityHint.standard: Default defensive assistance for this contact based on message patterns and relationship context.
translation.network.trust.sensitivityHint.cautious: More likely to surface payment, link, and rate-based trust notices for this contact.
translation.network.trust.sensitivityHint.vigilant: Maximum defensive sensitivity — treats interactions as higher risk even for trusted connections.
translation.network.notifications.alreadyConnected: You are already connected to this user.
translation.network.notifications.alreadyPending: This user has already sent you a pending request.
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.restartManual: Data folder updated, but Obscur could not restart automatically. Close and reopen the app.
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.alreadyBound: Obscur is already using this data folder.
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.freshStartSucce: Obscur will use {{path}} as your new data folder. Restarting…
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.reconnectSucces: Reconnected to your data folder at {{path}}. Restarting Obscur…
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.defaultIssue: Your Obscur data folder is not reachable. This often happens when a USB or external drive was disconnected.
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.title: Data folder unavailable
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.body: Pick a new folder on a local drive to get Obscur running again, reconnect the original drive, or open Storage settings for advanced options. Previous data on the missing drive is not deleted.
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.recoverableHint: A previous data folder was found at {{path}}.
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.exportHint: Choosing a new empty folder starts fresh local storage. Restore from an encrypted backup (.obscur-bundle) if you need previous messages and profiles.
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.subfolderDesc: Obscur creates a dedicated folder inside the location you selected.
translation.storage.dataRootRecovery.freshStartDesc: Obscur will bind to {{path}} and start with empty local storage. Messages and profiles on the missing drive will not load unless you restore from a backup or copy data into this folder later.
translation.settings.security.biometric.title: Biometric Lock
translation.settings.security.biometric.desc: Use fingerprint or face ID to unlock the app.
translation.settings.membershipSync.descR1: Workspace communities (R1) always use the coordination directory for join/leave. Nostr relays carry encrypted chat only—not roster authority.
translation.settings.membershipSync.r1Locked: Coordination preferred is required for new workspace communities.
translation.settings.membershipSync.coordinationBuil: Configure coordination in Operator setup or build env.
translation.settings.operatorSetup.coordinationRequi: Enter a coordination service URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8787).
translation.settings.operatorSetup.relayRequired: Enter a private workspace relay URL (e.g. ws://localhost:7000).
translation.settings.operatorSetup.coordinationUnrea: Coordination /health did not return ok. Run: pnpm -C apps/coordination dev
translation.settings.operatorSetup.successNoRelay: Coordination-only dev enabled. Create groups without Docker or a live Nostr relay; chat publish stays local until you add a relay later.
translation.settings.operatorSetup.success: Operator bundle applied: coordination directory + workspace relay. You can create managed workspace communities.
translation.settings.operatorSetup.title: Operator setup (private trust)
translation.settings.operatorSetup.desc: Bundle coordination membership directory and a private workspace relay. DM may still use public Nostr relays; workspace communities require this stack.
translation.settings.operatorSetup.assumeCoordinatio: Use when terminal curl http://127.0.0.1:8787/health works but the desktop app probe fails. Unblocks create UI; membership publish still needs a working path to coordination.
translation.settings.operatorSetup.skipRelayDesc: No VPS or Docker required. Membership uses coordination only; encrypted community chat stays on-device until you run pnpm dev:relay later.
translation.settings.security.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
translation.settings.search.label: Search settings
translation.groups.deleteCommunityMissingDetails: Community details are missing; unable to delete.
translation.groups.deleteCommunityHint: Open the leave page to confirm removal of all local data for {{profileLabel}} (keeps your account).
translation.search.title: Discovery
translation.settings.appearance.reducedMotionDesc: Reduce animations and transitions across the app.
translation.settings.appearance.contrastAssistDesc: Increase visual contrast for text and UI surfaces.
translation.settings.relays.disableAllDialogDesc: This turns off every relay in your list. Publishing and relay-backed sync stop until you enable at least one relay again.
translation.settings.notifications.permissionGranted: Permission granted. Notifications can be delivered.
translation.settings.notifications.permissionDeniedD: Permission denied. Enable notifications from system/browser settings.
translation.settings.notifications.permissionDefault: Permission not decided yet. Click Enable Notifications to request access.
translation.settings.notifications.permissionUnsuppo: This runtime does not support notifications.
translation.settings.notifications.channel.dmDesc: Notify when you receive a new DM.
translation.settings.notifications.channel.mentionsD: Notify when someone mentions or replies to you.
translation.settings.notifications.channel.invitesDe: Notify for invites and important system notices.
translation.settings.privacy.globalDesc: Control who can message you and how messages are wrapped.
translation.profile.aboutPlaceholder: Briefly introduce yourself so your friends can get to know you.
translation.profile.aboutHelp: Public profile bio shown in discovery previews.
translation.settings.relays.communityModesDesc: Relay settings are the transport baseline for honest community guarantees.
translation.settings.relays.communityModesManagedAva: This baseline can expose the advanced workspace path, but only for technical users who intentionally configured trusted/private relays.
translation.settings.relays.communityModesManagedHid: On the public/default relay path, this stays an advanced hidden path rather than a default promise.
translation.settings.relays.bulkHint: Disable all pauses publishing until you enable at least one relay again. Remove disabled drops rows that are toggled off.
translation.settings.dialogs.clearDataDesc: Are you sure you want to clear all local data? This will clear local caches and databases but will not delete your account.
translation.settings.dialogs.deleteAccountDesc: Are you sure you want to wipe local account data on this device and publish a deleted-account marker? This does not destroy the private key itself.
translation.settings.dialogs.deleteProfileWindowDesc: Use Account backup above first if you want to keep this account. Proceeding erases all local data for this window and removes it from this device. The private key still exists mathematically; without local data it is effectively a fresh account.
translation.settings.dialogs.deleteProfileWindowExpo: Need a copy elsewhere? Export from Account backup on this page, then return here to delete.
Backup saved. You can proceed with deletion when ready.
translation.settings.dialogs.deleteProfileWindowFail: Could not remove this profile window.
translation.settings.dialogs.deleteProfileWindowArch: A workspace archive was saved before this profile window was removed.
translation.settings.dialogs.resetProfileWindowDesc: Use Account backup above first if you want to keep this account. Proceeding erases all local data in this window and returns it to a fresh state. The default window cannot be removed from the device registry.
translation.settings.dialogs.resetProfileWindowArchi: A workspace archive was saved before this profile window was wiped.
translation.settings.dialogs.clearDataArchiveDesc: A workspace archive was saved before caches and history were cleared. Your account remains signed in on this device.
translation.settings.dialogs.deleteAccountArchiveDes: A workspace archive was saved before local data was removed from this profile window.
translation.settings.localData.deleteProfileWindowSe: Wipe all data in this profile window and remove it from this device in one step.
translation.settings.localData.resetProfileWindowSec: Wipe all data in the default profile window and return it to a fresh state.
translation.settings.localData.deleteProfileWindowKe: Your private key cannot be destroyed mathematically. Removing local data only removes this window's copy; export first if you need the account elsewhere.
translation.settings.localData.singleSessionNote: Obscur allows one active unlocked session per account across profile windows on this device. Sign out or lock in the other window before signing in here.
translation.profiles.activeSession.title: Account already active
translation.profiles.activeSession.body: Account {{accountPrefix}} is already unlocked in {{profileLabel}}. Sign out or lock there before signing in here.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderRestartFailed: Data folder updated, but Obscur could not restart automatically. Close and reopen the app.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderMigrationSkip: Moved {{count}} item(s) to the new folder (skipped {{skipped}} locked browser cache file(s)). Restarting Obscur…
translation.settings.storage.performanceModeDesc: Enable batched chat updates and adaptive rendering for smoother scrolling on large chats.
translation.settings.storage.chatUxV083Desc: Enable the new media viewer and chat interaction polish. Disable to use the stable v0.8.2 UX path.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderSlowStorageNo: Installer USB sticks and old flash drives are poor choices for daily data storage. Use a local SSD (for example E:\app.obscur.desktop) for smooth performance; use removable media for backup and travel only.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderBindDesc: Obscur keeps a fixed app path (AppData on Windows, Application Support on macOS, XDG on Linux). After you choose a folder, the app binds that path to your data with a redirect (junction on Windows, symlink on macOS/Linux) or a pointer fallback if the OS blocks redirect.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderPointerWarnin: Do not delete the AppData\app.obscur.desktop entry while Obscur is closed — remove the junction with rmdir (not del /s) if you must change paths. Your bytes stay on the target drive.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderSlowBannerDes: This folder is responding slowly. Move daily data to a local SSD for better startup and chat performance.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderRecoverBanner: Obscur can reconnect to {{path}} without copying files. Restart after confirming.
translation.settings.storage.dataFolderSubfolderDial: Obscur will create a dedicated folder inside the location you selected. Your profiles, database, vault cache, and backups will live inside that folder instead of the drive root.
translation.settings.relays.bulkRemoveDisabledBlocke: Enable at least one relay first, or remove rows individually.
translation.settings.relays.bulkRemoveDisabled: Removed disabled relays from the list.
translation.settings.relays.invalidRelayUrl: Please enter a valid relay URL (wss://…, or localhost ws/http for private mesh)
translation.groups.management.tabCopy.general.title: General
translation.groups.management.tabCopy.general.descri: Community name, avatar, description, and discovery settings.
translation.groups.management.tabCopy.members.title: Participants
translation.groups.management.tabCopy.members.descri: Active members can chat. Left or expelled members stay listed as history until they rejoin or post in the room again.
translation.groups.management.tabCopy.governance.des: Open votes on renames and member removals.
translation.groups.management.tabCopy.settings.title: Safety
translation.groups.management.tabCopy.settings.descr: Notifications, backup, keys, and leaving the community.
translation.groups.management.safety.notificationsDe: Community activity alerts on this device.
translation.groups.management.safety.inviteDesc: QR code and link for others to join.
translation.groups.management.safety.rotateDesc: Distribute a new encryption key to active members.
translation.groups.management.safety.backupDesc: Download metadata and keys as JSON.
translation.groups.management.safety.leaveDesc: Remove yourself from this room. If you are the last member, the community disbands.
translation.groups.management.general.multiMemberGov: This community has multiple members. Saving will create a governance proposal instead of applying immediately.
translation.groups.management.general.designatedStew: You are a designated steward - descriptor and member removal can apply without a community vote.
translation.groups.management.members.inviteOrWait: Invite someone or wait for membership sync from the relay.
translation.groups.management.general.avatarHint: Shown in discovery and on your community home. Square image, at least 256×256, max 5 MB.
translation.groups.create.waitStep.local.label: Local keys
translation.groups.create.waitStep.local.detail: Generate room key and save community on this device.
translation.groups.create.waitStep.relay.label: Relay publish
translation.groups.create.waitStep.relay.detailReady: Publish sealed genesis to the workspace relay.
translation.groups.create.waitStep.directory.label: Directory
translation.groups.relayBaseline.unconfigured.label: No Relay Baseline
translation.groups.relayBaseline.unconfigured.summar: No enabled relay baseline is visible, so the app should stay on the safest community guarantees.
translation.groups.relayBaseline.public_default.summ: This relay baseline matches the low-friction public/default path, so Sovereign Room is the honest default.
translation.groups.relayBaseline.managed_intranet.su: The selected relay baseline looks private or operator-controlled, so Managed Workspace can be offered as an advanced path.
translation.groups.relayBaseline.trusted_private.sum: The relay baseline includes custom relays beyond the public defaults, which can justify an advanced managed-workspace path when operators are trusted.
translation.groups.mode.managedWorkspace.label: Managed Workspace
translation.groups.mode.managedWorkspace.shortDescri: Advanced team coordination mode for trusted or operator-controlled relay environments.
translation.groups.mode.managedWorkspace.caution: Only choose this when your relay environment is deliberately controlled and your team accepts the stronger setup requirements.
translation.groups.mode.sovereignRoom.label: Sovereign Room
translation.groups.workspaceTrust.coordination_uncon: Workspace communities require a coordination service. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_COORDINATION_URL when building the app, then restart.
Local dev: run pnpm -C apps/coordination dev and set coordination URL to http://127.0.0.1:8787 in apps/pwa/.env.local.
translation.groups.workspaceTrust.coordination_unrea: Coordination service is not reachable. Start the coordination worker before creating or joining workspace communities.
Run pnpm -C apps/coordination dev and confirm GET /health returns ok:true.
translation.groups.workspaceTrust.relay_unconfigured: Choose a trusted community relay host (private, intranet, or operator-controlled)—not an empty host.
Add and enable a non-public relay in Settings → Relays, or use a localhost/intranet host for development.
Relay host must be a reachable Nostr relay (e.g. wss://relay.damus.io in Settings → Relays). Local Docker relay is optional.
Or set NEXT_PUBLIC_DEV_COORDINATION_ONLY_WORKSPACE=true in apps/pwa/.env.local to test membership without Docker.
translation.groups.workspaceTrust.public_relay_block: Public relays (nos.lol, damus.io, groups.fiatjaf.com, etc.) cannot host workspace membership. Use a trusted private relay plus coordination.
Disable public-default hosts for community scope; add your team relay URL in Settings → Relays.
translation.groups.workspaceTrust.allowed.settingsHi: Membership is owned by the coordination directory; the community relay carries encrypted chat only.
translation.groups.workspaceTrust.coordinationOnlyDe: Coordination-only dev mode: membership directory tests work without a local Nostr relay. For chat, enable a public relay (e.g. wss://relay.damus.io) in Settings → Relays.
translation.groups.managedWorkspaceGate.relay_tier_i: Managed Workspace settings are paused because your relay setup ({{label}}) does not meet workspace requirements. {{summary}}
Managed Workspace cannot use public default relays (nos.lol, damus.io, etc.). Use a trusted private or intranet relay with coordination.
translation.groups.managedWorkspaceGate.relay_tier_i: Keep stronger workspace claims tied to the actual private relay deployment and validate them before promising them broadly.
translation.groups.managedWorkspaceGate.allowed.sett: Keep stronger workspace claims tied to the actual private relay deployment and validate them before promising them broadly.
Use Settings -> Relays if you want to move into a trusted or workspace-style relay environment later.
translation.groups.home.notFound.title: Group Not Found
translation.groups.home.notFound.heading: Community Not Found
translation.groups.home.notFound.body: This group may have been deleted or you don't have access to it.
translation.groups.home.governanceBanner.hint: Open community management → Governance to review and vote.
translation.groups.home.defaultAbout: This resilient community is built on decentralized protocols. Privacy first, always.
translation.groups.home.roomKeyMissingTitle: Community room key is not on this device.
translation.groups.home.roomKeyMissingTitleLong: Community room key is not on this device. Open Manage community → rotate room key if you created this community before the storage update, then invite again.
translation.groups.membershipHealth.banner.title: Membership not fully ready
translation.groups.membershipHealth.summary.ready: Community membership is ready for chat and invites.
translation.groups.membershipHealth.summary.coordina: Coordination-only dev profile: membership directory is ready but chat transport is intentionally disabled.
translation.groups.membershipHealth.blocker.roomKeyM: Room key missing on this device
translation.groups.membershipHealth.blocker.coordina: Coordination directory is stale or missing
You are not listed in the coordination directory
translation.groups.membershipHealth.recovery.inviteR: Accept a community invite or restore the room key.
translation.groups.membershipHealth.recovery.configu: Add the community relay under Settings → Relays.
translation.groups.membershipHealth.recovery.retryJo: Retry join or wait for coordination sync.
translation.groups.home.leaveMissingDetails: Community details are missing; unable to open leave confirmation.
translation.groups.home.access.title: Community Access
translation.groups.home.access.descriptionAuthoritat: Open the encrypted chat, invite peers, and browse active members with leave and expulsion applied.
Browse active members and invite peers.
translation.groups.home.registry.title: Registry & Privacy
translation.groups.home.registry.publicListedFull: This community is public and listed in the decentralized registry.
translation.groups.home.registry.inviteOnlyFull: Access to this registry is strictly governed by invite-only protocols.
translation.groups.home.relay.title: Relay Infrastructure
translation.groups.home.relay.statusDetailNormal: All scoped events are flowing normally
translation.groups.home.relay.statusDetailFiltered: Some events were filtered by safety checks
translation.groups.home.personalControls.title: Personal controls
translation.groups.home.personalControls.description: Block, delete, or unblock this community on your device. Open Manage for members, governance, relay settings, and invites.
This host is not a Nostr relay ({{relay}}) — use Delete below, then recreate with a wss:// relay.
translation.groups.home.block.title: Block community
translation.groups.home.block.description: Hide this community from your inbox and stop notifications
translation.groups.home.block.unblockDescription: Allow messages and notifications from this community again
translation.groups.home.delete.title: Delete community
translation.groups.home.participantsModal.title: Community Participants
translation.groups.home.participantsModal.searchPlac: Search participants by name, pubkey, or profile info...
translation.groups.home.participantsModal.notInConta: {{count}} visible participant is not in your contacts.
{{count}} visible participants are not in your contacts.
translation.groups.home.participantsModal.allInConta: Everyone visible here is already in your contacts.
translation.groups.home.participantsModal.noNotInCon: No visible participants outside your contacts.
translation.groups.home.toast.chooseRelayBeforeJoin: Choose a community relay before joining.
translation.groups.home.toast.blockMissingDetails: Community details are missing; unable to open block confirmation.
translation.groups.home.toast.reconcileMissingDetail: Community details are missing; cannot reconcile.
translation.groups.home.toast.clearTerminalMissingDe: Community details are missing; cannot clear terminal cache.
translation.groups.directoryHonesty.unconfigured.sum: Participant list is local evidence only
translation.groups.directoryHonesty.unconfigured.det: Enable relays in Settings before treating this roster as relay-backed directory truth.
translation.groups.directoryHonesty.public_default_m: Managed workspace directory is not available on public default relays
Switch to a trusted or private relay baseline to materialize workspace-grade directory claims.
translation.groups.directoryHonesty.public_default_c: Coordination directory with relay hints on public relays

Left/expelled members are applied on this device, but there is no exact live global roster on public relays. Membership changes prefer the Obscur coordination directory when it is online; relay roster lines are hints only. Open Settings → Relays → Community membership sync for faster cross-device leave visibility when a coordination service is configured.
translation.groups.directoryHonesty.public_default_b: Best-effort participant discovery on public relays

Left/expelled members are applied on this device, but there is no exact live global roster on public relays. Open Settings → Relays → Community membership sync for faster cross-device leave visibility when a coordination service is configured.
translation.groups.directoryHonesty.coordination_dir: Join and leave are applied from the Obscur coordination directory on this device. Relay roster lines are chat-delivery hints only.
translation.groups.directoryHonesty.trusted_private_: Directory materialization is partial until coordination is configured
Enable coordination in Settings → Relays for workspace-grade membership authority.
Trusted relay baseline — stronger roster materialization candidate
Custom relays improve discovery; exact live roster may still lag relay gossip.
translation.groups.directoryHonesty.intranet_managed: Roster counts reflect relay and participation evidence merged on this device.
translation.groups.directoryHonesty.intranet_soverei: Private relay — stronger directory sync candidate
Roster counts reflect relay and participation evidence merged on this device.
translation.settings.privacy.dmPolicyHint: Choose who can reach your inbox by default.
translation.settings.privacy.modernDmsDesc: Adds stronger metadata privacy for compatible clients and relays.
translation.settings.privacy.retentionHint: Limits chat history rendered on this device.
translation.settings.privacy.showPubkeyTitle: Show Public Key Controls In Chat
translation.settings.privacy.showPubkeyDesc: Keeps the chat header focused on usernames unless you explicitly enable Share ID controls.
translation.settings.privacy.summary: DM policy: {{dmPolicy}} · Modern DMs: {{modernDms}} · Retention: {{retention}} · Public key controls: {{pubkeyControls}}
translation.settings.security.postureDesc: Current protection status and capability checks.
translation.settings.security.sessionDesc: Security settings for your current session.
translation.settings.security.lockNowDesc: Lock immediately without signing out. Your account stays on this device until you unlock again.
translation.settings.security.sessionActionsSummary: Use Lock Now for immediate protection; clear local data only when needed.
translation.settings.security.resetLocalHistoryDesc: This clears local chat history, sync checkpoints, and cached media on this device, but keeps your identity/session and remember-me credentials.
translation.settings.security.verificationDesc: Manage your identity verification and security preferences
translation.settings.security.fingerprintHelp: This visual fingerprint is uniquely generated from your public key. Share it with contacts to help them verify your identity.
translation.settings.security.securityTipBody: Always verify your contacts' visual fingerprints before sharing sensitive information. Ask them to confirm their fingerprint matches what you see in their profile.
translation.profile.friendCodeHelp: Use this friend code for quick account discovery.
translation.profile.friendCodeSuffixHelp: Prefix is fixed by app identity; edit only the 6-character suffix.
translation.vault.saveFromChatLocalVaultOnly: This media already lives in your encrypted local Vault.
translation.vault.saveFromChatBlockedHost: For security, Obscur will not save media from local or private network URLs.
translation.vault.saveFromChatUnsupportedUrl: This attachment URL cannot be saved to the Vault. Try downloading it locally first, then use Secure Upload.
